scene_title: Anjo profetico sobre linha de montagem
narrative_beat: Anjo medieval vermelho-sangue sobre robos de cima

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: colorful vivid medieval prophetic angel in blood-red robes with wide spread wings hovering above assembly line in vibrant foreground
subject.focal_point: the angel's blood-red robes and wide wings
subject.secondary: black and white desaturated industrial assembly line with rows of humanoid robots seen from above in background

symbolism.primary: angel as divine observer of the image being built
symbolism.secondary: blood-red robes as color of judgment watching from above

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
muted desaturated background palette warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
